local.name: Tikkun Olam Alliance
local.description: A left-wing advocacy org focused on social justice, Palestinian rights, anti-racism, and progressive domestic policy.
traits: Progressive donor base: bold stances required

local.name: Jewish Federation of Metroland
local.description: A centrist advocacy org seeking bipartisan coalitions on antisemitism, Israel, and Jewish continuity.
traits: Bipartisan by design: balance is everything

local.name: Ashford JCC
local.description: A community hub providing programs, childcare, fitness, and cultural events for Jews of all backgrounds in a city without much Jewish infrastructure.

national.name: Lion of Judah
national.description: A national pro-Israel advocacy organization with deep congressional relationships, focused on US-Israel relations and combating left-wing antisemitism.
traits: Major donor network spans Wall Street and Silicon Valley
Congressional relationships on both sides of the aisle
High expectations: any misstep is front-page news

national.name: Synagogue Council
national.description: A national network providing resources and networking opportunities to hundreds of mostly Reform, Conservative and Reconstructionist synagogues, along with some modern Orthodox congregations.
traits: Network of 1,200 synagogues depending on your leadership
Apolitical brand: politics fractures the network
Security and continuity are the twin mandates

notes: Orgs removed in the 3-org reduction. The local `left` (Tikkun Olam Alliance) and local `center` (Jewish Federation of Metroland) are fully retired. The nat_left (Jews for Justice) and nat_center (Association of American Jews) are KEPT in the game but renamed to `left` and `center` respectively — they are NOT in this archive file. Only orgs that are fully retired from the game are here.
